_metadata.source: HHS Office of the Assistant Secretary for Planning and Evaluation — 2025 HHS Poverty Guidelines
_metadata.cross_verified_via: WIC Federal Register Notice 2025-03576 (90 FR 11598) Table: 100% FPL column = SNAP FY2026 net limits exactly
used_by: SNAP FY2026 (Oct 1 2025 – Sep 30 2026): gross=130% of these, net=100% of these
WIC 2025-2026 (Jul 1 2025 – Jun 30 2026): income limits = 185% of these
not_used_by: Medicaid CY2026 — uses 2026 HHS FPL (see us_fpl_2026.json)
_metadata.verification_note: Annual values confirmed via WIC FR Notice 2025-03576 (100% FPL column). Monthly values cross-verified against SNAP FY2026 net income limits (identical). Per-additional-person = $5,500/year, $459/month.

notes: VERIFIED: Annual values confirmed from WIC Federal Register 2025-03576 (90 FR 11598), 100% FPL column.
Monthly values = SNAP FY2026 net income limits (100% FPL column matches exactly).
These guidelines are derived from 2024 Census Bureau poverty thresholds adjusted for CPI-U.
These are GUIDELINES (used for program eligibility), not the Census poverty THRESHOLDS (used for statistics).
